description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Serge Rey gtd-php (aka Getting Things Done) 0.5 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the Description field in (1) newProject.php, (2) newList.php, and (3) newWaitingOn.php; the Title field in (4) newProject.php, (5) newList.php, (6) newWaitingOn.php, (7) newChecklist.php, (8) newContext.php, and (9) newGoal.php; the (10) Category Name field in newCategory.php; the (11) listTitle field in listReport.php; the (12) projectName field in projectReport.php; and the (13) checklistTitle field in checklistReport.php.
